name: devops
description: Azure DevOps HYBRID integration with Work Tracking System. Features: persistent user profile (DevOps.md) with cached identity and team GUIDs, unified /create command with auto-type detection, /workday dashboard with auto-sync, time logging with compliance, /init setup with CLI + MCP + profile generation, intelligent routing with 3 specialized subagents (Haiku for CRUD, Sonnet for planning and PR review), task monitor with loop-based alerts, 6 skill-handled workflows, and 100+ MCP tools.
